data.body:
The U.S. ACTUALLY started in 1789 with the enacting of the constitution.

All this U.S. 250 bullshit? It's actually not celebrating the anniversary of the U.S. government.

It's celebrating the declaration of intention to start one.

The ACTUAL 250th anniversary of the U.S. state? It's not til 2032.
